titleEn: Komet Invests in Irrigation Intelligence to Close One of Agriculture’s Biggest Data Gaps
titleZh: 科迈特投资灌溉智能技术，填补农业最大数据空白之一
summaryZh: 科迈特灌溉公司宣布成立新的应用工程与数字系统部门，并推出“体验中心”，旨在通过科学测量和可重复数据，深入研究喷灌系统从喷头到作物的全过程，填补灌溉领域长期缺乏精准数据的空白。该举措将推动喷灌科学、工程和决策的全球进步，帮助种植者、经销商和OEM厂商在气候多变和水资源稀缺背景下做出更明智的灌溉决策。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了灌溉领域从经验驱动向数据驱动转型的关键突破，其智能传感与数字分析思路对智慧畜牧中水管理、环境监控等场景具有直接借鉴价值。
contentFull: By Komet Irrigation Share Komet Irrigation’s new Application Engineering & Digital Systems division and Experience Hub will generate globally relevant insights to advance pivot irrigation science, engineering, and decision-making. As global agriculture faces growing pressure to improve productivity, adapt to climate volatility, and manage increasingly scarce water resources, one critical part of the production system remains surprisingly under-measured: pivot irrigation itself. While modern agriculture benefits from sophisticated data relating to genetics, fertilizer programs, crop protection, and machinery performance, irrigation decisions continue to rely heavily on experience, visual observation, and assumptions developed over decades in the field. Komet Irrigation, the Austrian multinational and global leader in precision sprinkler and end-of-system-solutions for pivot irrigation, believes that must change. Today, the company announced a significant six-figure investment in a new Application Engineering & Digital Systems division, alongside the launch of the Komet Experience Hub, a new global capability designed to generate the data, insights, and engineering knowledge needed to advance irrigation performance worldwide. Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More New ARA 595 Sprayer Brings AI-Powered Precision to Irrigated Crops in the Western U.S. Led by Global Innovation Director, Gustavo Hossri, the new division brings together engineering, testing, diagnostics, and digital innovation with a clear objective: helping the industry better understand what happens between the sprinkler and the crop. “The future of agriculture will depend on better decisions,” said Andree Groos, CEO of Komet Irrigation. “Agriculture has become increasingly data-driven, yet irrigation remains one of the least measured variables in crop production. We believe the next generation of progress will come not only from better products, but from better information.” The investment includes the establishment of the Komet Experience Hub, an advanced research, testing, training, and demonstration environment designed to study irrigation performance in unprecedented detail. The facility will support the development of new methodologies, diagnostics, and performance metrics that help growers, dealers, OEMs, and irrigation professionals make more informed decisions. For decades, questions such as how sprinkler wear affects performance, when components should be replaced, how environmental conditions influence water delivery, and how irrigation systems can be optimized have often been answered through experience and observation. Komet’s new capability seeks to bring scientific measurement and repeatable data to these questions. “Many of the industry’s most important decisions are still made with limited measurable information,” said Hossri. “Our goal is to generate data, metrics, and insights that allow growers and partners to make decisions with greater confidence. We are moving from observation to measurement, and from assumptions to evidence.” While the Experience Hub is in Brazil, the company emphasizes that the initiative is global in both purpose and application. Brazil was selected because of its advanced agricultural sector, the availability of top educated agronomists and engineers, diverse operating environments, and relevance to some of the world’s most productive farming systems. The knowledge generated through the facility will be shared across Komet’s global network and used to support growers and partners around the world. The investment also reflects a broader evolution in Komet’s approach to innovation. Beyond developing industry-leading sprinkler technologies, the company is expanding into diagnostics, performance intelligence, digital services, and data-driven decision support. Future offerings developed through the new division will help customers better understand irrigation system performance, optimize operational efficiency, and improve long-term decision-making. Already, Experience Hub has attracted significant interest from irrigation experts, growers, OEMs, dealers, and industry partners, with some visitors spending several hours exploring the facility and its capabilities. On 26 June, Komet will officially inaugurate the Experience Hub in Brazil, bringing together industry leaders, growers, researchers, partners, government representatives, and media from around the world. “As the world works to feed a growing population while managing increasingly complex environmental challenges, water will become one of agriculture’s most strategic resources,” added Groos. “We believe the future belongs to those who understand more, so they can use resources more intelligently. This investment is about helping our industry build that future.” 1 1 5 Komet Invests in Irrigation Intelligence to Close One of Agriculture's Biggest Data Gaps Subscribe Today For Subscribe Founded in 1952 and headquartered in Lienz, Austria, Komet Irrigation is a global specialist in precision water application for mechanized irrigation. See all author stories here. Topics: featured-home
translationZh:
科迈特灌溉公司的新应用工程与数字系统部门以及体验中心将生成全球相关的见解，以推动喷灌科学、工程和决策的进步。

随着全球农业面临提高生产力、适应气候波动和管理日益稀缺的水资源的压力日益增大，生产系统中一个关键部分却仍然出人意料地缺乏测量：喷灌本身。虽然现代农业受益于与遗传学、肥料方案、作物保护和机械性能相关的复杂数据，但灌溉决策仍然严重依赖经验、视觉观察和数十年来在田间形成的假设。

科迈特灌溉公司，这家奥地利跨国企业、全球喷灌精准喷头和末端系统解决方案的领导者，认为这种情况必须改变。今天，该公司宣布对新的应用工程与数字系统部门进行一笔六位数的重大投资，同时推出科迈特体验中心，这是一个新的全球能力平台，旨在生成推动全球灌溉性能进步所需的数据、见解和工程知识。

由全球创新总监古斯塔沃·霍斯里领导，新部门将工程、测试、诊断和数字创新整合在一起，目标明确：帮助行业更好地理解从喷头到作物之间发生了什么。

“农业的未来将依赖于更好的决策，”科迈特灌溉公司首席执行官安德烈·格罗斯说。“农业已经变得越来越数据驱动，但灌溉仍然是作物生产中测量最少的变量之一。我们相信，下一代的进步不仅来自更好的产品，也来自更好的信息。”

该投资包括建立科迈特体验中心，这是一个先进的研究、测试、培训和演示环境，旨在以前所未有的细节研究灌溉性能。该设施将支持开发新的方法、诊断工具和性能指标，帮助种植者、经销商、OEM厂商和灌溉专业人士做出更明智的决策。

几十年来，诸如喷头磨损如何影响性能、何时应更换组件、环境条件如何影响水分配送以及如何优化灌溉系统等问题，往往通过经验和观察来回答。科迈特的新能力旨在为这些问题带来科学测量和可重复的数据。

“行业中许多最重要的决策仍然是在有限的可测量信息下做出的，”霍斯里说。“我们的目标是生成数据、指标和见解，使种植者和合作伙伴能够以更大的信心做出决策。”
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
New Application Engineering & Digital Systems division and Experience Hub will generate globally relevant insights to advance pivot irrigation science, engineering, and decision-making.
The post Komet Invests in Irrigation Intelligence to Close One of Agriculture’s Biggest Data Gaps appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
